details.test: Task 1: Register for earliest weekday evening food pantry shift
Task 2: Sign up for free in-person financial coaching workshop
Task 3: Make one-time split donation to Youth Outreach and Local Food Pantry
Task 4: Create multi-event outreach plan from upcoming events
Task 5: Request info for Wednesday afternoon fresh-produce food pantry
Task 6: Subscribe to weekly devotional for ages 18–35 with selected topics
Task 7: Submit private family-related prayer request for upcoming Sunday
Task 8: RSVP for earliest Saturday morning light-activity event (cleanup-like) with 2 guests
